nasb.text: Moreover, in their wailing they will take up a lamentation for you And lament over you: ‘Who is like Tyre, Like her who is silent in the midst of the sea?

esv.text: In their wailing they raise a lamentation for you and lament over you: ‘Who is like Tyre, like one destroyed in the midst of the sea?

cnv.text: 他們為你哀悼的時候，必為你作一首哀歌： 有哪一座城， 像在海中沉寂的推羅呢？

ccb.text: 他们在痛哭中为你唱起哀歌， 哀悼你说， 有哪一座城像泰尔一样在深海中销声匿迹呢？
